root_text.an5.137:1.1: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, appaṁ rattiyā supanti, bahuṁ jagganti.
root_text.an5.137:1.3: Itthī, bhikkhave, purisādhippāyā appaṁ rattiyā supati, bahuṁ jaggati.
root_text.an5.137:1.4: Puriso, bhikkhave, itthādhippāyo appaṁ rattiyā supati, bahuṁ jaggati.
root_text.an5.137:1.5: Coro, bhikkhave, ādānādhippāyo appaṁ rattiyā supati, bahuṁ jaggati.
root_text.an5.137:1.6: Rājā, bhikkhave, rājakaraṇīyesu yutto appaṁ rattiyā supati, bahuṁ jaggati.
root_text.an5.137:1.7: Bhikkhu, bhikkhave, visaṁyogādhippāyo appaṁ rattiyā supati, bahuṁ jaggati.
root_text.an5.137:1.8: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca appaṁ rattiyā supanti, bahuṁ jaggantī”ti.

translation_text.an5.137:1.1: “Mendicants, these five sleep little at night, staying mostly awake.
translation_text.an5.137:1.3: A woman longing for a man.
translation_text.an5.137:1.4: A man longing for a woman.
translation_text.an5.137:1.5: A thief longing for their loot.
translation_text.an5.137:1.6: A king busy with his duties.
translation_text.an5.137:1.7: A mendicant longing for freedom from the yoke.
translation_text.an5.137:1.8: These five sleep little at night, staying mostly awake.”
